author: Caleb Porzio
message:
Add API design philosophy guide to .claude/rules

Judgment-layer companion to adding-features.md: the ladder (ship
behavior > inherit > extend > mint), surface placement, naming
grammar, defaults, state homes, and smell tests for designing new
public APIs. Derived from shipped v4 decisions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Caleb Porzio
message:
docs: format long inline nginx snippet as a code block

An 83-character inline code span can't wrap gracefully — as a fenced
code block it reads better and can't overflow narrow viewports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
